task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for KitchenAid Pro Line Stand Mixer (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $629.00 and wholesale is $440.00. Product features: Professional-grade stand mixer with 7-quart bowl and 1.3HP motor. Reference: https://www.kitchenaid.com/countertop-appliances/stand-mixers/bowl-lift-stand-mixers/p.7-quart-bowl-lift-stand-mixer.ksm7586pca.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for KitchenAid Pro Line Stand Mixer. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying KitchenAid Pro Line Stand Mixer. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
